casino.title: Chip Tray with Hole Card Reader
casino.description: Integrated a hole card reader into a casino chip tray. Principal designer for the reader integration and co-designer of a dual-cam locking cover that rivals any existing cover in security. One of the most popular chip trays in casinos — instrumental in Scientific Games' 2018 acquisition of Tech Art, Inc.

casino.title: Express Layout Change
casino.description: A belt-like system that secures gaming table felt without staples, eliminating a labor-intensive multi-person installation process. Lets a single technician swap table layouts quickly on the casino floor.

maker.title: 3rd Gen 4Runner Corner Lights
maker.description: Custom front turning/clearance lights across multiple client-spec iterations. 3D design, plastic fabrication, 3D-printed mold tooling for casting refraction lenses, PCB design, and microcontroller programming.

maker.title: Tiger Zord Tailgate Emblem
maker.description: Converted 2D artwork into a 3D model, prototyped via 3D printing, then produced a waterproofed final version installed on a vehicle tailgate.

maker.title: 3D Printer Filament Dryer
maker.description: Filament drying system combining off-the-shelf parts with custom 3D-printed components designed in Fusion 360. Parts on Thingiverse; full build tutorial on YouTube.

designs.title: 16-Foot Holiday Sleigh Prop
designs.description: Santa sleigh for the City of North Las Vegas Winter Holiday Display at Silver Mesa Recreation Center. Wheelchair accessible, engineered to disassemble and store between seasons.

designs.title: Lotus Esprit V8 Engine Cover Insert
designs.description: Transparent engine cover redesign to showcase the V8. Fiberglass and polyester resin composite with polycarbonate louvers engineered to withstand engine vibration.

designs.title: Miller Lodge Pool Table Light
designs.description: Custom lighting fixture for a log cabin setting. Graphics and construction style matched to the rustic aesthetic of the surroundings.

designs.title: 10-Foot Mickey Mouse Ears Balloon Structure
designs.description: Large-scale balloon installation standing 10 feet tall with Mickey Mouse ears silhouette and full color base columns.

designs.title: Custom Bottle Display Shelving
designs.description: Bespoke wall-mounted shelving units designed and fabricated for a large bottle display collection.

fun.title: Gingerbread Holiday Decoration
fun.description: Large-scale gingerbread-themed holiday decorations for family and community displays. Structural design built to survive outdoor conditions and repeated seasonal assembly.

fun.title: Oversized Christmas Lights
fun.description: Custom giant string-light props — fabricated oversized bulbs with internal lighting for outdoor holiday displays. Designed for maximum visual impact and weather durability.

fun.title: Animated Paper Mache Pumpkin
fun.description: My daughter wanted to carve pumpkins way too early in the season — Halloween is serious business in our house. We made a deal: we'd build them early, but no fruit allowed. Starting from a plastic pumpkin in the garage as a base form, we built everything from scratch using paper mache. I adapted eye movement mechanics from Thingiverse, wrote custom code for randomized eye movements and candle-flicker LEDs, and implemented it all on an Arduino Nano. She took on the role of project manager and creative director — making all the important calls: the shape, exactly how angry it looks, the eye movement style, body color, and LED glow color. I handled the engineering. She handled everything that actually mattered.
